title: Intensely Roasted Algerian Lamb Tagine
description: A roasted and snappy Algerian dish featuring gherkin relish and flambe, this lamb tagine is a nostalgic treat, free from nuts for a safe and enjoyable meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb shoulder with salt, black pepper, cumin, and paprika.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over high heat.
Seal the lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, then remove from heat.
Add the garlic and ginger to the pot and cook until fragrant.
Add the gherkin relish and flambe liquid to the pot and stir to combine.
Return the lamb shoulder to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and roast for 2 hours.
Remove the pot from the oven and flambe the lamb shoulder.
Let the tagine rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
